text:
Created attachment 146658
pet portlint

Pet portlint: add LICENSE, trim pkg-message

With this patch

$ portlint -A
WARN: /usr/home/lifanov/src/svn/ports/head/news/diablo/pkg-plist: [71]: unknown pkg-plist directive "@mode"
WARN: /usr/home/lifanov/src/svn/ports/head/news/diablo/pkg-plist: [125]: unknown pkg-plist directive "@owner"
WARN: /usr/home/lifanov/src/svn/ports/head/news/diablo/pkg-plist: [126]: unknown pkg-plist directive "@group"
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
WARN: Makefile: new ports should not set PORTREVISION.
0 fatal errors and 5 warnings found.
